items.title: Composition wires the Cialdini rubric into the TrustEngagement prompt
items.precondition: node 22; node_modules symlinked to primary checkout.
items.expected: loadAgentPrompt('auditAgents/gbp/TrustEngagement') contains both the base prompt ('Headless GBP Pillar Scorer') and the fragment signature ('CIALDINI HONEST-INFLUENCE RUBRIC'), and is strictly longer than the base.
items.evidence: 3 passed (3). Composed prompt contains both anchors; length > base.

items.title: Enforcement is real — mutation proof
steps: 1. Remove the TrustEngagement row from AGENT_LATTICE_LOADOUT.
items.expected: Row removed -> suite fails ('expected ...Headless GBP Pillar Sco... to contain CIALDINI HONEST-INFLUENCE RUBRIC'). Row restored -> 3 passed.
items.evidence: Removed: 1 failed | 2 passed, exact expected assertion. Restored: 3 passed. This is what makes the rubric enforced, not decorative.

items.title: Unmapped agent is byte-identical to loadPrompt()
items.expected: Equal. Blast radius is contained to the one mapped agent.
items.evidence: Asserted in the composition test (2nd case), green.

items.title: Missing fragment fails loud
items.expected: Throws. No silent degrade to base prompt.
items.evidence: Asserted in the composition test (3rd case), green.

items.title: Typecheck + full backend suite + conventions gate
items.expected: tsc exit 0 / 0 errors; full suite 0 failed; 0 backend structural violations.
items.evidence: tsc exit 0, 0 errors. Full suite: 2146 passed, 0 failed. Conventions: 0 backend structural violations (VOCAB-BYPASS advisory only, same class as all agent prompts).

items.title: Discoverability — one fixed, findable path
steps: 1. Confirm AGENTS.md has the 'Agent Knowledge Injection' pointer at the top.
2. Confirm src/agents/lattice/README.md exists and names library -> loadout -> registry -> composer -> test.
items.expected: A fresh session asking 'how does master knowledge reach agents?' lands on the path without a search.
items.evidence: AGENTS.md pointer section added (same pattern as THE FUNNEL); README.md entry-point index present with the fixed path and the 3-step workflow.
items.notes: The anti-hallucination layer: a place for everything, everything in its place.

items.title: Safety net — an injected rubric can never break an agent
items.expected: If a composed prompt returns unparseable output, runComposedAgent degrades to the base prompt (help-or-no-op, never break). Unmapped agents and clean parses do not retry.
items.evidence: 3 passed: degrade-on-break (2 model calls, onDegrade fired, fallback used base prompt), no-retry-when-unmapped (1 call), no-retry-when-clean (1 call). Full suite 2149 passed / 0 failed.
items.notes: Closes the JSON-regression risk the adversary surfaced; removes downside, not yet upside.
